entries.note: V64-B reuses the shipped V64-A writable-surface descriptor, repo write lease, and exact target admission by default.
V64-B remains on the same exact admitted target path as shipped V64-A.
V64-B restoration is not fresh writable-surface selection, fresh lease issuance, or fresh target admission by itself.
V64-B carries the shipped concrete write-effect observation and conformance lineage explicitly rather than overreading writable entitlement alone.
The same exact target-membership and occupancy or admissibility carry-through from V64-A remain explicit and fail closed in V64-B.
V64-B preserves the V64-A local_write/create_new semantics envelope and adds only one typed compensating restoration seam.
All-repo authority, shell or execute authority, dispatch widening, and delegated worker authority remain deferred beyond V64-B.
